MELItem.Title: Aircraft Autonomous Distress Tracking (ADT) System - Applicable to VN-A877, VN-A878

ListItem.Para: Repairs are made within 90 consecutive calendar days.
Gain access to the ELT-DT in the passenger compartment ceiling.
For ACR model ELT-DT, set the ELT-DT front panel switch to OFF.
For Dukane-Seacom model ELT-DT, disconnect the ELT-DT J1 connector (D3007) and secure for flight.
ELT-DT Switch is placed in ARMED mode.

Note.Para: The remote ELT switch is meant to refer to the panel in the flight deckand is not to be confused with the remote function panel (RFP) which is a maintenance device provided by the ELT-DT supplier.
If remote ELT switch is failed so that the ELT-DT system is activated, deactivate the ELT-DT system and dispatch per MMEL 23-24-04-01A or 23-24-04-01C.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: If ELT-DT does not activate with the remote ELT switch set to ON, deactivate the remote ELT switch (AMM DDG 23-24-04).

ListItem.Para: Placard the inoperative remote ELT switch.
Set the remote ELT switch to ARM.
Set the ELT-DT (LRU) front panel switch to ARM.
ELT-DT is set to fixed ELT mode.
Repairs are made within 90 consecutive calendar days.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate ATU and set the ELT-DT to fixed ELT mode (AMM DDG 23-24-04).

ListItem.Para: Open circuit breaker CE2324802 and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to the ATU Lockout toggle switch (S2324111) in the E-12 rack.
Position the ATU Lockout toggle switch to ATU LOCKOUT to set the ELT-DT to fixed ELT mode.
